name: rms-mobile-wrapper
description: Capacitor mobile wrapper for RMS web application

scripts.cap:android:dev: cross-env APP_ENV=development npm run build:config && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:android:prod: cross-env APP_ENV=production npm run build:config && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:ios:dev: cross-env APP_ENV=development npm run build:config && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:ios:prod: cross-env APP_ENV=production npm run build:config && npx cap sync ios
